commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ffmpeg git ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

set -eux; echo "[railpack] install cwd=$(pwd)"; ls -la; if [ -f package.json ]; then echo "[railpack] using root package.json"; cd .; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then echo "[railpack] using quickrec_web_server/package.json"; cd quickrec_web_server; elif [ -f web_server/package.json ]; then echo "[railpack] using web_server/package.json"; cd web_server; else echo "[railpack] package.json not found, fallback clone quickrec_web_server into /app"; rm -rf /app/quickrec_web_server; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/tu95/quickrec_web_server.git /app/quickrec_web_server; cd /app/quickrec_web_server; fi; echo "[railpack] app dir=$(pwd)"; ls -la; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; else npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi

set -eux; if [ -f package.json ]; then cd .; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd quickrec_web_server; elif [ -f web_server/package.json ]; then cd web_server; elif [ -f /app/quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd /app/quickrec_web_server; else echo "[railpack] package.json not found for build"; exit 1; fi; echo "[railpack] build dir=$(pwd)"; ls -la; npm run build

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'set -eux; if [ -f package.json ]; then cd .; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd quickrec_web_server; elif [ -f web_server/package.json ]; then cd web_server; elif [ -f /app/quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd /app/quickrec_web_server; else echo "[railpack] package.json not found for start"; exit 1; fi; echo "[railpack] start dir=$(pwd)"; npm run start'
